scene1_hook: Zoom in on a vintage kite soaring above the Pittsburgh skyline.
scene2_problem: But as our children's playgrounds fill with screens, the ancient art of kite flying is disappearing. Only 15% of kids fly a kite on their birthday.
scene3_stakes: Imagine a world where future generations lose touch with the thrill and wonder of flight. It's a loss that will leave us grounded and grey.
scene4_solution: The Pittsburgh Kite Flyers Society is dedicated to keeping this timeless tradition alive. Your donation funds workshops, materials, and community events.
scene5_ask: Join us in preserving the art of kite flying for generations to come. Donate now at pghkites.org/donate and give the gift of flight!
